column2:
kable(coef_table %>% select(term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p_formatted, sig),
      caption = "Coeficientes del modelo de regresión lineal",
      digits = 6,
      col.names = c("Variable", "Estimación", "Error Est.", "t-stat", "p-valor", "Sig."),
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"), font_size = 8)
